title: Server crash when trying to delete a table has been added to a merge table with "cascade" at the end
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE joe1 (id Int32, name String);
CREATE TABLE joe2 (id Int32, value Decimal(10, 2) DEFAULT 0.00);
CREATE TABLE joe3 (id Int32, description String);
ALTER TABLE joe3 ADD COLUMN name String;
ALTER TABLE joe3 ADD COLUMN value Decimal(10, 2) DEFAULT 0.00;
key_bug_features: drop table with cascade on a merge table
